name: The Peninsula
description: Located on the southernmost tip of the map, this settlement is almost entirel surrounded by water. Skilled shipwrights and fishermen call this place home, and the settlement is known for its big harbor.
history: The youngest settlement, it was founded by a group of explorers who discovered, on a rare day without any mist, the big island to the southeast. And so, they started a new life here, building a harbor which grew to withstand even the strongest storms and tides, monsters and corrupted creatures. The settlement is now a hub for those who, one day, want to set sail and explore the uncharted island.
points_of_interest: The Harbor: A large and well-protected harbor, where skilled shipwrights train to build a vessel capable of withstanding the treacherous waters and storms that surround the peninsula.
The Shipyard: Instead of a place to store ships, this place is actually known as a guild, where all the shipwrights gather to share knowledge and train.

The Corals Reefs: Although extremely beautiful, the coral reefs surrounding the peninsula are treacherous for. Many ships have been lost either to sharp rocks or to the creatures that lurk and stalk those shallow waters.
